payload.long_description: Soft-sided navy-blue fabric storage basket with a subtle diamond/check texture and a sewn beige loop handle on the front; rectangular cuboid, open-top bin that is slightly occluded at the bottom by a white shelf edge and appears about 0.8 m from the camera.
